headline: Incyte Reports Strong 54-Week Data From Late-Stage Skin Disorder Study
summary: Incyte's povorcitinib shows sustained 54-week efficacy in HS, with strong response rates and safety profile, reinforcing its potential.

headline: A Look Back at Biotechnology Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Vs The Rest Of The Pack

headline: Reported Saturday, Incyte's Povorcitinib Achieves Up To 57% HiSCR75 And 29% HiSCR100 At Week 54 In Phase 3 STOP-HS Trials, With NDA And MAA Under Regulatory Review
summary: Phase 3 data from the STOP-HS program demonstrate povorcitinib's substantial and durable clinical efficacy through Week 54 in patients with moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS).Through Week 54, clinically
